== Notes for [[Item:Q105370|Q105370]] ==

Villanueva de Cavazos, Lilia E. '' Testamentos Coloniales de Monterrey'', Monterrey, Nuevo León, Mexico, 1991, pages 18-22. [Ramo Civil, Vol. 5, Exp. 22, Folio 3] ... The '''1643 will of Capitán Miguel De Montemayor''' (dated 11 October 1643) cites his parents, his wife Mónica Rodríguez, her parents Capitán Diego Rodríguez and Sebastiana de Tremiño, a deceased son Lucas, as well as his legitimate children Diego, Margarita, Petrona, '''María''', Francisco, Domingo, José, Bernardo, and Mateo. Additionally, the will cites two "bastard" daughters: María, wife of Juan Maldonado, and Juana, wife of Andrés de Charles. Further, the will directs that he be interred in Monterrey's Iglesia Parroquial and states that he is ill near to death.
--------------------
=== GEDCOM Note ===
_CRE DATE 30 SEP 2016 TIME 13:28:00

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000018959746320

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
